verses.text: Abimelech seeks to be king at Shechem. Ambition. He grasps for power.
Abimelech seeks to be king at Shechem. Ambition. He grasps for power.
Abimelech seeks to be king at Shechem. Ambition. He grasps for power.
He slays his seventy brethren on one stone, save Jotham. Murder. Bloodshed wins the crown.
He slays his seventy brethren on one stone, save Jotham. Murder. Bloodshed wins the crown.
He slays his seventy brethren on one stone, save Jotham. Murder. Bloodshed wins the crown.
Jotham's parable: the trees go forth to seek a king. The parable. He exposes their folly.
Jotham's parable: the trees go forth to seek a king. The parable. He exposes their folly.
Jotham's parable: the trees go forth to seek a king. The parable. He exposes their folly.
Jotham's parable: the trees go forth to seek a king. The parable. He exposes their folly.
The bramble alone will reign, threatening fire. The bramble. The worthless grasps at rule.
The bramble alone will reign, threatening fire. The bramble. The worthless grasps at rule.
The bramble alone will reign, threatening fire. The bramble. The worthless grasps at rule.
The bramble alone will reign, threatening fire. The bramble. The worthless grasps at rule.
The bramble alone will reign, threatening fire. The bramble. The worthless grasps at rule.
Jotham charges them with ingratitude to Gideon's house. Charge. They repaid good with evil.
Jotham charges them with ingratitude to Gideon's house. Charge. They repaid good with evil.
Jotham charges them with ingratitude to Gideon's house. Charge. They repaid good with evil.
He curses them and flees to Beer. The curse. Evil will recoil.
He curses them and flees to Beer. The curse. Evil will recoil.
He curses them and flees to Beer. The curse. Evil will recoil.
After three years, God sends a spirit of discord. Discord. Sin sows its own ruin.
After three years, God sends a spirit of discord. Discord. Sin sows its own ruin.
After three years, God sends a spirit of discord. Discord. Sin sows its own ruin.
After three years, God sends a spirit of discord. Discord. Sin sows its own ruin.
Gaal stirs up Shechem against Abimelech. Revolt. The city turns.
Gaal stirs up Shechem against Abimelech. Revolt. The city turns.
Gaal stirs up Shechem against Abimelech. Revolt. The city turns.
Gaal stirs up Shechem against Abimelech. Revolt. The city turns.
Zebul warns Abimelech to ambush them. Plotted. The conflict deepens.
Zebul warns Abimelech to ambush them. Plotted. The conflict deepens.
Zebul warns Abimelech to ambush them. Plotted. The conflict deepens.
Zebul warns Abimelech to ambush them. Plotted. The conflict deepens.
Abimelech ambushes; Gaal is taunted by Zebul. Trapped. Gaal's boast is tested.
Abimelech ambushes; Gaal is taunted by Zebul. Trapped. Gaal's boast is tested.
Abimelech ambushes; Gaal is taunted by Zebul. Trapped. Gaal's boast is tested.
Abimelech ambushes; Gaal is taunted by Zebul. Trapped. Gaal's boast is tested.
Abimelech ambushes; Gaal is taunted by Zebul. Trapped. Gaal's boast is tested.
Gaal is beaten and thrust out. Defeated. The rebel fails.
Gaal is beaten and thrust out. Defeated. The rebel fails.
Gaal is beaten and thrust out. Defeated. The rebel fails.
Abimelech destroys Shechem and sows it with salt. Destroyed. The city is ruined.
Abimelech destroys Shechem and sows it with salt. Destroyed. The city is ruined.
Abimelech destroys Shechem and sows it with salt. Destroyed. The city is ruined.
Abimelech destroys Shechem and sows it with salt. Destroyed. The city is ruined.
He burns the tower of Shechem with its people. Burned. Jotham's curse comes true.
He burns the tower of Shechem with its people. Burned. Jotham's curse comes true.
He burns the tower of Shechem with its people. Burned. Jotham's curse comes true.
He burns the tower of Shechem with its people. Burned. Jotham's curse comes true.
He besieges Thebez and storms the tower. Thebez. He presses on in pride.
He besieges Thebez and storms the tower. Thebez. He presses on in pride.
He besieges Thebez and storms the tower. Thebez. He presses on in pride.
A woman drops a millstone on his head. Struck. His pride is brought low.
A woman drops a millstone on his head. Struck. His pride is brought low.
A woman drops a millstone on his head. Struck. His pride is brought low.
God repaid the evil of Abimelech and of Shechem. Repaid. Justice is done at last.
God repaid the evil of Abimelech and of Shechem. Repaid. Justice is done at last.
